## Security checklist

- [ ] No secrets, API keys, or credentials committed
- [ ] No PII logged (emails, phone numbers, payment details, tokens)
- [ ] All new inputs validated (Zod/express-validator) and sanitized where rendered
- [ ] Auth/authorization checked on any new or changed endpoint
- [ ] Audit log added for any new sensitive action

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `npm run build` passes with 0 TypeScript errors
- [ ] CI is green
